abilities.name: Combat Reading
abilities.description: When making disengaging strikes, add Scrutiny (+2) to Acting Value.

abilities.name: Reckless
abilities.description: At start of turn, may suffer 1 damage to gain 1 additional General AP.

actions: (1) Brahk'blade (Labor) | AV: 4 (9) | Rg: y2 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. No Triggers.
(1) Collier Navy (Pistol) | AV: 5 (10) | Rg: z12 | Resist: Df | Target suffers 2/3/4 damage. Capacity 6, Reload 2. Ram Unload: If 2+ bullets remain, +2 damage and weapon empty.
system.notes: Failed immigrants taking jobs no reputable mercenary will touch — extortion, kidnapping, murder. Survive at any cost.
